name: Shenzhen Qingyi Photomask Limited
summary: Shenzhen Qingyi Photomask Limited manufactures high precision masks that integrates the research, design, production, and sales activities in China. It offers TFT, color STN, STN, and TNLCD chrome plate masks; EL and OLED chrome plate masks; PDP and VFD chrome plate masks; IC capsulation, chrome plate, and dry masks; chrome plate masks for precision electronic components, such as MEMS, SENSOR, and ENCODZR; and LCD solid and liquid relief plates. The company also provides mask handling, cleaning, recycle, and pellicle remount services. Its products are primarily used in liquid crystal display, organic electron luminescence and other flat panel display, integrated circuit and related, printed circuit board, and precision component industrial applications. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
